title: Disco

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1: appliance controller connect: 2 wired or wireless switches bubble machine disco light

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1.  Play some music to set the disco mood.
2.  The switch user can press switches to control lights and bubbles.
3.  Encourage them to explore and have fun with the effects.
NB: You can use a switch adapted bubble machine and/or disco light with or instead of an appliance controller.

tooltipText: Use a Click-It-On (or similar) or two switch adapted toys to control lights and bubbles for a disco
